header_2_letter_spacing_last_edited=”on|tablet” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

774 Patents Granted & Counting

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.3em” text_orientation=”center” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|desktop” max_width=”70%” max_width_tablet=”100%” max_width_phone=”100%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” text_font_size_tablet=”18px” text_font_size_phone=”16px” text_font_size_last_edited=”off|desktop” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI creates and manufactures key hardware and software solutions for the global computer marketplace, providing the highest quality and compatibility necessary to build today’s advanced computing systems. In pursuit of this core mission, AMI has been awarded over 500 US patents throughout the course of its 30+ year history.

A list of all current AMI US patents can be found on the US Patent and Trademark Office website here at the USPTO website.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
